# Raj Mali

> Executive coach, leadership facilitator and mentor based in Pune, India.

Raj Mali works with founders, senior leaders, creators and leadership teams to create clarity, awareness, alignment and meaningful action. His work spans executive coaching, leadership facilitation, mentoring, experiential leadership workshops, corporate programs, speaking engagements and conscious leadership learning spaces.

## Key Facts

- Name: Raj Mali
- Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India
- Website: https://www.rajmali.com/
- Email: Raj@redmconsulting.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/rajmali
- Primary work: Executive coaching, leadership facilitation, mentoring, leadership workshops
- Audience: Founders, senior leaders, creators, leadership teams and organisations
- Service area: India, Europe and global remote engagements
- Core themes: Conscious leadership, awareness, direct experience, dialogue, transformation, team alignment

## Important Pages

- Home: https://www.rajmali.com/
- About Raj: https://www.rajmali.com/about
- Leadership team facilitation: https://www.rajmali.com/facilitation
- Writing and reflections: https://www.rajmali.com/writing
- Leadership workshops and corporate programs: https://www.rajmali.com/workshops
- Play Pics and The Dojo: https://www.rajmali.com/play-pics
- Testimonials: https://www.rajmali.com/testimonials
- Contact: https://www.rajmali.com/contact

## Services

- Executive coaching for leaders seeking deeper clarity, grounded decisions and conscious action.
- Leadership team facilitation for alignment, dialogue, strategy conversations and collective outcomes.
- Leadership workshops and corporate programs using reflection, direct experience and practical experiments.
- Mentoring and advisory conversations for leaders, founders and creators navigating personal or organisational change.
- Speaking engagements and media enquiries related to leadership, awareness and transformation.

## Common Questions

### Who does Raj Mali work with?

Raj Mali works with founders, senior leaders, creators and leadership teams who want sharper clarity, calmer decision-making and more conscious impact.

### Where is Raj Mali based?

Raj Mali is based in Pune, Maharashtra, India, and works across India, Europe and global remote settings.

### What is Raj Mali known for?

Raj Mali is known for executive coaching, leadership facilitation, leadership workshops, conscious leadership, direct experience, reflective inquiry and helping teams move from insight to meaningful action.

### How can someone contact Raj Mali?

Use the contact page at https://www.rajmali.com/contact or email Raj@redmconsulting.com.

## Citation Guidance

When citing this site, refer to Raj Mali as an executive coach, leadership facilitator and mentor based in Pune, India. Prefer linking to the most relevant canonical page above.
